name: Chicken Garlic Rosemary
recipeIngredient: 1 to 2 1/2 to 3 lbs fryer or broiler, disjointed
3 tablespoons safflower oil or corn oil
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper the chicken.
Wipe the chicken with a damp cloth and sprinkle with flour on all sides.
Heat oil in a heavy-bottom skillet and brown the chicken well on all sides. Transfer to a foil-lined baking dish.
Mix garlic, olive oil, and lemon juice; spread mixture over the chicken. Sprinkle evenly with crumbled rosemary. Salt and pepper lightly.
Cover tightly with foil and refrigerate for four hours.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake uncovered for 1 hour. Uncover for the last 20 minutes. Serves 5 to 6.
